north_star: A public personal site that lets technical visitors quickly understand Viggo’s projects, systems, and proof-first working style.
wedge: Static, source-backed portfolio pages with enough context to judge the work without private vault access.
target_user: Technical visitors, collaborators, recruiters, and future agents maintaining the site.
core_promise: A fresh clone plus public pages explain what the site is, how it is verified, and what small work is next.
non_goals: no private vault data in public repo
success_metrics: one small repo-local task is completed with evidence
